name: LESAKA TECHNOLOGIES INC
sic_description: Functions Related To Depository Banking, NEC
summary: Lesaka Technologies Inc. is a South African fintech company enabling underserviced consumers and businesses across Southern Africa to manage financial activities. It serves over 2 million consumers with banking, credit, insurance, and payout solutions; over 125,000 merchants with payment acceptance and cash management solutions; and over 750 enterprises with proprietary network capabilities for payments. Operating in South Africa, Namibia, Botswana, Zambia, and Kenya, Lesaka offers products across consumer and merchant financial lifecycles through three segments: Merchant, Consumer, and Enterprise.
